name: Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Tart apples; slice, peel, and core
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and 1 tablespoon granulated sugar.
2. With two knives, cut the shortening into the flour until the mixture is mealy.
3. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture and add the egg and milk. Stir to combine.
4. Gradually stir in the flour mixture to form a smooth batter. Pour into a greased 2-quart mold.
5. Arrange the sliced apples in rows on top of the batter, pushing them halfway into the dough.
6. In a small bowl, mix the cinnamon, nutmeg, and 2 tablespoons sugar.
7. Sprinkle the spice mixture over the apples and dot with apricot jam.
8. Drizzle the melted butter over the entire cake.
9. Cover loosely with a plate and place in the slow cooker.
10. Close the cooker but prop the lid open slightly with a toothpick or a twist of foil to allow excess steam to escape.
11. Cook on High for 3 to 4 hours.
